Off Calendar May-17-2022 Continued To Jun-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (31 Lobos Street, San Francisco, Ca 94112)
Off Calendar May-26-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Warren Woo appeared in person for Wanda Ellison Crockett (Executor).
Annetta Rosenstein (Real Estate Agent), Edwin Buccat (Buyer) and Amy Buccat (Buyer) also present in court.

The sale was confirmed at $1,150,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed April 30, 2021. The Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property is under submission for review of the order with the Court's intent to grant the petition. An additional is not required as the will waives bond. Mr. Woo informed the Court that the commissions is at 4% and that it is to be divided equally between the Seller's Agent and the Buyer's Agent.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-18-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated July 27, 2020 is admitted to probate. Wanda Ellison Crockett is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 17, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
